name: RPlog_talk_Ephant_Mon_and_Malif
title: Talk Page: Wiki Cleanup Welcome
summary: This is an out-of-character wiki talk page for the Ephant Mon and Malif log, containing two brief messages. The player of Ephant Mon admits being bad at wiki formatting and invites others to fix the page, and the editor Krackor reports having tidied it up while inviting more experienced editors to make further corrections. There is no in-character roleplay content.
